3278410.name: DuoBellum de Marionnette
3278410.description:
◆ The little dolls that live in the mansion

Even after their master's death, the dolls continue to engage in dueling dramas in secret.

An old mansion deep in the forest. If the secret power hidden there is obtained,

the curtain will rise on an even more fierce duel...

A beautiful drama of duels woven by fascinating dolls.

The dungeon beneath the mansion. If you bring back the secret powers that lie dormant there,

the duels will become even more intense.

Spend your days fighting to become the strongest doll, undefeated.

The dolls eagerly await the arrival of their new master.

Skillfully manipulate your puppets, engage in countless battles,

and enjoy the sweet taste of victory and the humiliation of defeat.

Hidden powers lie hidden in the underground dungeons.

Explore and gather power to make your duels even more intense and brutal.

Formidable enemies await.

◆ Game Content

This game includes the following base content:

- Seven unique playable characters

- Versus modes (online and CPU), practice mode, key configuration, and other settings

- Dungeons teeming with monsters

- Three powerful bosses lurking within the dungeons

We plan to regularly add content and release DLC after release.
